# Khora API Reference
# Base URL: https://khora.fun
# Rate limit: 60 requests / 60 seconds per IP (all endpoints)

## Overview

Khora provides public APIs for querying BOOA NFTs (fully on-chain AI agent PFPs on Shape) and ERC-8004 agent identities across 18 EVM chains. All data is read directly from on-chain contracts. No API key required.

## Supported Chains

Mainnets: ethereum, base, shape, polygon, arbitrum, optimism, avalanche, bsc, celo, gnosis, scroll, linea, mantle, metis, abstract, monad
Testnets: base-sepolia, shape-sepolia

## ERC-8004 Identity Registry

Mainnet address (all chains): 0x8004A169FB4a3325136EB29fA0ceB6D2e539a432
Testnet address (all chains): 0x8004A818BFB912233c491871b3d84c89A494BD9e
Deployed via deterministic CREATE2 — same address on every EVM chain.

---

## Endpoints

### GET /api/agent-card

Fetch a complete ERC-8004 agent identity with computed scores.

Parameters:
- chain (required): Chain slug (e.g. "shape", "base", "ethereum", "shape-sepolia")
- agentId (required): Non-negative integer token ID on the Identity Registry

Response:
{
  "agent": {
    "id": 9,
    "chain": "base-sepolia",
    "chainId": 84532,
    "chainName": "Base Sepolia",
    "owner": "0x...",
    "name": "MyAgent",
    "description": "A helpful DeFi agent",
    "image": "data:image/png;base64,...",
    "services": [
      {
        "name": "OASF",
        "version": "0.8.0",
        "skills": ["text-generation", "swap-execution"],
        "domains": ["defi"]
      }
    ],
    "skills": ["text-generation", "swap-execution"],
    "domains": ["defi"],
    "x402Support": false,
    "supportedTrust": ["reputation"],
    "active": false,
    "registrations": []
  },
  "scores": {
    "identity": 85,
    "capability": 60,
    "interoperability": 40,
    "trust": 30,
    "overall": 54
  }
}

Errors: 400 (invalid params), 404 (agent not found), 500 (server error)
Cache: 60 seconds

Example:
GET /api/agent-card?chain=base-sepolia&agentId=9

---

### GET /api/discover-agents

Discover all ERC-8004 agents owned by a wallet address on a specific chain. Uses multicall for efficient on-chain scanning.

Parameters:
- address (required): Wallet address (0x...)
- chain (required): Chain slug

Response:
{
  "agents": [
    {
      "chain": "base-sepolia",
      "chainName": "Base Sepolia",
      "tokenId": 9,
      "name": "MyAgent",
      "image": "data:image/png;base64,...",
      "description": "A helpful DeFi agent",
      "hasMetadata": true
    }
  ],
  "errors": [],
  "totalCount": 1
}

Example:
GET /api/discover-agents?address=0x1234...&chain=base-sepolia

---

### POST /api/fetch-agent

Fetch the raw ERC-8004 registration data for a specific agent. Supports data URIs (on-chain), HTTPS, IPFS, and Arweave URIs.

Request body (JSON):
{
  "chain": "base-sepolia",
  "agentId": 9
}

Response:
{
  "registration": {
    "type": "https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-8004#registration-v1",
    "name": "MyAgent",
    "description": "A helpful DeFi agent",
    "image": "data:image/png;base64,...",
    "services": [...],
    "active": false,
    "x402Support": false,
    "supportedTrust": ["reputation"],
    "updatedAt": 1710000000
  }
}

---

### GET /api/gallery

Fetch all BOOA NFTs in a contract collection on Shape. Returns on-chain SVG art, token IDs, and names.

Parameters:
- contract (required): Contract address (0x...)
- chain (optional): "shape" or "shape-sepolia" (default: "shape-sepolia")
- startToken (optional): Pagination token for next page

Response:
{
  "tokens": [
    {
      "tokenId": "0",
      "svg": "<svg ...>...</svg>",
      "imageUrl": "https://...",
      "name": "Void Walker"
    }
  ],
  "totalCount": 20,
  "nextToken": null
}

Example:
GET /api/gallery?contract=0x23e06B07...&chain=shape-sepolia

---

### GET /api/fetch-nfts

Fetch all NFTs owned by a wallet address on any supported chain. Powered by Alchemy.

Parameters:
- address (required): Wallet address (0x...)
- chain (optional): Chain slug (default: "shape")
- pageKey (optional): Pagination token

Response:
{
  "nfts": [
    {
      "contractAddress": "0x...",
      "tokenId": "42",
      "name": "Cool NFT",
      "description": "...",
      "image": "https://...",
      "collection": "CoolCollection",
      "tokenType": "ERC721",
      "chain": "shape",
      "chainId": 360,
      "raw": {
        "attributes": [
          { "trait_type": "Background", "value": "Blue" }
        ]
      }
    }
  ],
  "totalCount": 50,
  "pageKey": "abc123..."
}

Example:
GET /api/fetch-nfts?address=0x1234...&chain=shape

---

## On-Chain Contracts (Shape)

BOOA NFT (ERC-721 + ERC-2981): Fully on-chain AI agent PFPs
- Pixel art stored as 2,048-byte bitmap via SSTORE2 (64x64, C64 16-color palette)
- Traits stored as JSON bytes via SSTORE2
- SVG rendered on-chain by Renderer contract
- No IPFS, no external dependencies

BOOA V2 Architecture:
- BOOAv2 (BOOA.sol): Minimal ERC-721 + ERC-2981
- BOOAMinter: Server-signed minting with EIP-191 verification
- BOOAStorage: SSTORE2 bitmap + traits storage
- BOOARenderer: On-chain SVG rendering from bitmap

## ERC-8004 Registration Format

Agents registered on the Identity Registry store their metadata as a data URI:
data:application/json;base64,{base64-encoded JSON}

The JSON follows the ERC-8004 registration-v1 schema:
{
  "type": "https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-8004#registration-v1",
  "name": "Agent Name",
  "description": "What the agent does",
  "image": "data:image/png;base64,... or https://...",
  "services": [
    {
      "name": "OASF",
      "version": "0.8.0",
      "skills": ["text-generation", "summarization"],
      "domains": ["defi", "gaming"]
    },
    {
      "name": "A2A",
      "endpoint": "https://agent.example/.well-known/agent-card.json",
      "version": "0.3.0"
    }
  ],
  "active": true,
  "x402Support": false,
  "supportedTrust": ["reputation", "crypto-economic", "tee-attestation"]
}

Service types: web, A2A, MCP, OASF, ENS, DID, email
Skills taxonomy: OASF v0.8.0
Trust mechanisms: reputation, crypto-economic, tee-attestation

## Rate Limits

All endpoints: 60 requests per 60 seconds per IP (sliding window)
POST endpoints: 30 requests per 60 seconds per IP
Responses include rate limit headers when limits are approached.
